stop.prompt: The agent is finishing. Verify whether PROJECT_STATUS.md, TASKS.md, HANDOFF.md, and CURRENT_CONTEXT.md in .cursor/project-management/ were updated this session. If the agent made code or task changes but did not update PM files, respond with a follow-up reminding the agent to update all four files and DECISIONS.md if a decision was made. Hook input: $ARGUMENTS

subagentStop.prompt: A subagent has finished. The parent agent must aggregate subagent results and update .cursor/project-management/ (TASKS.md, HANDOFF.md, PROJECT_STATUS.md, CURRENT_CONTEXT.md). If parallel work changed task status or files, remind the parent to update PM state before ending. Hook input: $ARGUMENTS
